zh.title: AI 史官评语
zh.style_formal_desc: 模仿《史记》列传风格，文言文评价
zh.style_anecdotal_desc: 民间说书风格，通俗有趣
zh.style_eulogy_desc: 古代谥号评定格式，正式庄重
zh.chat_subtitle: 史官记得你的画像与他之前的评语，可以继续追问
zh.chat_hint: 评语已生成，现在可以向史官追问任何历史问题。史官会记得你的画像和评语，保持判断一致性。
zh.q_dynasty_details: 我关注{{dynasty}}，这个朝代有什么被低估的细节？
zh.q_learn_one_thing: 如果我从{{name}}身上只学一件事，应该是什么？
zh.q_historian_judgment: 历史学家会怎么评价我这种"画像"？

en.title: AI Historian Commentary
en.style_formal_desc: In the style of Records of the Grand Historian, classical Chinese
en.style_anecdotal_desc: Folk storytelling style, accessible and lively
en.style_eulogy_desc: Posthumous title appraisal format, formal and solemn
en.chat_subtitle: The historian remembers your portrait and previous commentary, feel free to follow up
en.chat_hint: Commentary is ready. You may now ask the historian any historical question. The historian remembers your portrait and commentary to stay consistent.
en.q_mirror_figure: Why is {{name}} said to be my mirror?
en.q_dynasty_details: I am interested in {{dynasty}}. What underrated details does this dynasty have?
en.q_learn_one_thing: If I could learn only one thing from {{name}}, what should it be?
en.q_historian_judgment: How would historians judge this kind of "portrait" of me?

zh.title: 历史智慧问答
zh.description: 基于史料回答历史问题
zh.input_placeholder: 问任何历史问题… 例如：安史之乱到底怎么影响唐朝经济的？
zh.request_failed: 请求失败，请检查 API Key 配置
zh.answer_subtitle: 基于史料检索，非凭空作答
zh.suggestion_1: 安史之乱到底怎么影响唐朝经济的？
zh.suggestion_2: 秦始皇统一六国用了什么策略？
zh.suggestion_4: 明朝灭亡和气候有关系吗？
zh.suggestion_5: 孔子和老子有什么分歧？
zh.suggestion_6: 唐朝和宋朝哪个更繁荣？
zh.suggestion_7: 赤壁之战曹操为什么会输？
zh.suggestion_8: 四大发明是怎么传到西方的？

en.title: History Wisdom Q&A
en.description: Answering history questions based on historical sources
en.input_placeholder: Ask any history question… e.g., How exactly did the An Lushan Rebellion affect the Tang economy?
en.request_failed: Request failed, please check API Key configuration
en.answer_subtitle: Based on historical source retrieval, not fabricated
en.suggestion_1: How exactly did the An Lushan Rebellion affect the Tang economy?
en.suggestion_2: What strategy did Qin Shi Huang use to unify the six states?
en.suggestion_3: Why did the Song Dynasty emphasize civil over military?
en.suggestion_4: Was the fall of the Ming Dynasty related to climate?
en.suggestion_5: What disagreements did Confucius and Laozi have?
en.suggestion_6: Which was more prosperous, the Tang or the Song?
en.suggestion_7: Why did Cao Cao lose the Battle of Red Cliffs?
en.suggestion_8: How did the Four Great Inventions reach the West?

zh.title: 跨时空辩论场
zh.description: 不同时代的人怎么想同一件事

zh.ask_placeholder: 你想问什么？两位辩手都会回答…

en.title: Cross-Time Debate Arena
en.description: How people from different eras view the same issue
en.no_pair_hint: No debaters configured for this topic yet, stay tuned
en.ask_placeholder: What do you want to ask? Both debaters will answer…

zh.title: 历史人物每日问候
zh.description: 关注你喜欢的历史人物，每天收到他们的问候
zh.follow_title: 关注人物（已关注 {{n}} 人）
zh.follow_hint: 关注的人物每天会给你发问候消息
zh.empty_desc: 先关注几位历史人物，明天就能收到他们的问候啦！

en.title: Daily Greetings from Historical Figures
en.description: Follow your favorite historical figures and receive their daily greetings
en.follow_hint: Followed figures will send you greeting messages every day
en.empty_desc: Follow a few historical figures, and you'll receive their greetings tomorrow!

zh.title: 与历史人物对话
zh.rule_hint: 注 当前为规则版回复，后续将接入 LLM 实现真正智能对话。可尝试询问人物专长话题（如问孔子"仁"、问李白"诗"）获得更好体验。

en.title: Dialog with Historical Figures
en.topic_btn_template: May I ask about the Way of {{topic}}?
en.rule_hint: Note: Currently using rule-based replies. LLM integration is planned for truly intelligent conversation. Try asking about a figure's expertise (e.g., ask Confucius about "benevolence", Li Bai about "poetry") for a better experience.

zh.title: 时空邮筒
zh.description: 给历史人物写信，AI 以其口吻回信
zh.recipient_title: 收件人 选择历史人物
zh.input_placeholder:
给{{name}}写点什么吧…
可以问他的生平、探讨他的思想、或者只是聊聊你的困惑。

en.title: Time Mailbox
en.description: Write letters to historical figures, AI replies in their voice
en.input_placeholder:
Write something to {{name}}…
Ask about their life, discuss their ideas, or just share your thoughts.
